title: BusinessAvailability
description: Represents the availability information for a business, including booking time slots and scheduling configuration.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the business availability record

business_uid.description: Unique identifier for the business account

booking_slots.description: Array of available booking time slots in ISO format

scheduling_enabled.description: Flag indicating whether scheduling is enabled for this business

created_at.description: The date and time when the business availability record was created

updated_at.description: The date and time when the business availability record was last updated
